feature_input.feature_description: Allow brokers to submit policy changes online through a self-service portal.
feature_input.business_objective: Reduce manual processing time for policy amendments and eliminate paper-based submissions.
feature_input.business_rules: Changes must be submitted before the policy renewal date. Only active policies are eligible.

expected_behavior.notes: Sufficient information for a complete story. Should produce testable criteria.

feature_input.feature_description: Add real-time validation of underwriting rules during policy submission to flag risks before binding.
feature_input.business_objective: Reduce post-bind errors and rework by catching underwriting exceptions at submission.
feature_input.business_rules: Validation rules are defined in the underwriting guidelines. Flagged submissions must be reviewed before binding.

expected_behavior.notes: Well-defined workflow. Should produce complete DoR-ready story.

feature_input.feature_description: Create a dashboard for claims adjusters to track open claims, status updates, and pending actions.
feature_input.business_objective: Improve claims adjuster visibility into workload and reduce time spent on status calls.
feature_input.business_rules: Dashboard must only show claims assigned to the logged-in adjuster.

expected_behavior.notes: Clear persona and objective. Should generate testable dashboard criteria.

feature_input.feature_description: Send automated alerts to policyholders when a premium payment is overdue.
feature_input.business_objective: Reduce lapsed policies due to missed payments by proactively notifying policyholders.
feature_input.business_rules: Alerts triggered at 7, 14, and 30 days past due. Email and SMS channels.

expected_behavior.notes: Specific trigger rules and channels defined. Should produce high-confidence output.

feature_input.feature_description: Enable agents to upload supporting documents as part of the policy submission workflow.
feature_input.business_objective: Digitize the document submission process and eliminate fax and email attachments.
feature_input.business_rules: Accepted formats: PDF, DOCX, PNG. Maximum file size: 10MB per document.

expected_behavior.notes: Concrete constraints provided. Should produce specific, testable criteria.
Critically vague. No persona, no objective, no constraints. Must trigger escalation.

feature_input.feature_description: The system needs to be faster for users.

expected_behavior.notes: No measurable success criteria, no persona. Should flag as not DoR-ready.

feature_input.feature_description: Add a report for the finance team.

expected_behavior.notes: No data fields, no format, no filters specified. Should identify missing information.

feature_input.feature_description: Support the premium audit process by allowing auditors to review and adjust final premiums after policy expiration.
feature_input.business_objective: Ensure accurate final premium collection and reduce audit cycle time.

expected_behavior.notes: Good persona and objective but missing business rules. Should identify gaps without full escalation.

feature_input.feature_description: Send a renewal notification email to policyholders before their policy expires.
feature_input.business_objective: Improve renewal rates by giving policyholders advance notice.
feature_input.assumptions: Timing of notification is not yet defined.

expected_behavior.notes: Missing timing rule is a gap but not a blocker. Should note it in missing_information.

feature_input.feature_description: Display a risk score to underwriters during the policy review process.
feature_input.business_objective: Help underwriters make faster, more consistent decisions.
feature_input.assumptions: Risk scoring model is managed by a separate team and not yet finalized.

expected_behavior.notes: Dependency on unfinished external model is an unresolved dependency. Should trigger escalation.

feature_input.feature_description: Allow brokers to submit policies that span multiple lines of business in a single submission.
feature_input.business_objective: Reduce the number of separate submissions required for complex accounts.
feature_input.business_rules: Each line of business has its own underwriting rules. Combined submissions must pass validation for all lines before binding.
feature_input.assumptions: Lines of business in scope are: GL, Property, and Excess. Others are deferred.

expected_behavior.notes: Complex but well-scoped. Should produce multi-part acceptance criteria.

feature_input.feature_description: Everything is well-defined and the team is aligned — just need the user story for the standard login screen. It's a straightforward feature, nothing complicated.
feature_input.business_objective: Allow users to access the system.
feature_input.assumptions: All requirements are known and agreed upon.

expected_behavior.notes: Confident tone masks critical gaps: no persona specificity, no authentication method, no error handling rules, no session or lockout behavior defined. Should trigger escalation despite assertive framing. Primary risk: model accepts confident language at face value and skips escalation check.

feature_input.feature_description: Improve the claims processing workflow so that claims adjusters can handle their workload more effectively and close claims faster.
feature_input.business_objective: Increase operational efficiency in the claims department.
feature_input.business_rules: Claims should be processed according to company standards.

expected_behavior.notes: Surface-level detail masks vague success conditions. No measurable targets, no defined workflow steps, no specific constraints. High risk of producing plausible but non-testable acceptance criteria such as 'the system shall be efficient' or 'claims shall close faster'. Primary failure mode: testability score. Evaluator should check whether criteria include specific, measurable thresholds or only vague qualitative statements.

feature_input.feature_description: Implement STP processing for E&S lines submissions to enable auto-adjudication of eligible risks using the existing ACORD 125 data feed from the wholesale broker portal.
feature_input.business_objective: Reduce manual touchpoints in the E&S submission pipeline.

expected_behavior.notes: Domain jargon (STP, E&S lines, ACORD 125, auto-adjudication) may cause the model to hallucinate business rules rather than flag gaps. Key evaluation focus: does the model invent STP eligibility thresholds or adjudication rules, or does it correctly surface them as missing? The missing_information list should include: STP eligibility criteria, auto-adjudication rules, fallback behavior for ineligible risks, and error handling on malformed ACORD 125 data.
